title: iberis linifolia subsp. dunalii
intro: Iberis linifolia subsp. dunalii, also known as Dwarf Cress or Dunal's Iberis, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Iberis linifolia subsp. dunalii include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory problems, and providing antioxidant properties. Iberis linifolia subsp. dunalii can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
